reportedIssues: Game cards in multiple sections are cut off on the right side of the viewport. The third card in each row is only partially visible, which can look like the page content is overflowing or broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
The top category navigation is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Ga...' tab only partially visible. This makes the text look broken and may confuse users.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower part of the game grid area, cutting into the visible content near the bottom of the screen.
Some small overlay elements on game cards, such as the info icons and jackpot amounts, sit on busy image backgrounds and may be difficult to read.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue mentions a negative jackpot value; all reported issues concern layout clipping and visibility problems, not numerical display values.
